tools.name: word_count
tools.description: Count the number of words, characters, and lines in the provided text.

tools.name: replace_text
tools.description:
Replace every occurrence of 'find' with 'replacement' in the given text.
The search is case-sensitive.

tools.name: extract_emails
tools.description: Extract all email addresses found in the provided text, one per line.

tools.name: summarise_lines
tools.description:
Return the first max_lines lines of the text. Useful for previewing large documents.
Defaults to 5 lines.

tools.name: transform_case
tools.description:
Transform the case of the text. Mode must be one of:
upper, lower, title, sentence.

tools.name: wrap_text
tools.description:
Wrap text to a given line width (default 80 characters).
Optionally prepend each line with a prefix string (e.g. '> ' for quoting).
